extraction.one_line_summary: KEMNA Lennard won from the breakaway on the cat-2 summit finish while GC group split in crosswinds first hour, time gaps awarded at 2.6km due to mudslide chaos.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma put seven riders in crosswind split early, averaging 32mph first hour to pressure GC rivals before climb.
Soudal drove echelon in gutter while Jumbo fanned wide, revealing conflicting crosswind tactics between top teams.
Organizers awarded GC times at 2.6km from finish due to mudslide, creating tactical incentive for late attacks pre-obstacle.
ALMEIDA and VLASOV attacked inside 2km together, gaining seconds on ROGLIC/EVENEPOEL group through mudslide time-cut loophole.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: stayed with SOLER throughout split but lost time to ALMEIDA/VLASOV/ROGLIC/VINGEGAARD/EVENEPOEL group, gap unclear pending official times
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: attacked with VLASOV inside 2.6km to exploit mudslide time-cut, led GC favorites group across line
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: followed ROGLIC/EVENEPOEL group, gained time on KUSS but not on ALMEIDA attack
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: finished with ROGLIC and VINGEGAARD, gaining on KUSS but conceding to ALMEIDA/VLASOV move
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: caught behind initial crosswind split, minutes down after early echelon selection
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: led GC favorites group through finish with EVENEPOEL on wheel, teammate gained stage win
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: positive: attacked with ALMEIDA inside 2.6km, took pulls in crosswind echelon showing strong form
